text:
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
10 
SOURCE: 
NCDPD DataQ™ 
VALUES: 
(e.g., 3336C0003X) 
COMMENT: 
This primary taxonomy code applies to the primary dispenser type (variable called 
PRIMARY_DISPENSER_TYPE). For each pharmacy, there is information for up to three taxonomy codes, 
associated with each of the dispenser types (reference SECONDARY_TAXONOMY_CODE and 
TERTIARY_TAXONOMY_CODE variables). 
Additional details regarding the National Council for Prescription Drug Programs (NCPDP) source data 
are available
